title: Crunchy Slovakian Almond Pancakes
description: A yeasty and crumbly Slovakian dish featuring almond milk and confit tomato, perfect for a midnight craving, and friendly to dairy free diets.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, sugar, and salt.
Gradually add the chilled almond milk to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Fold in the diced confit tomato and toasted sliced almonds.
Heat the almond oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the skillet.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Serve the pancakes warm, garnished with additional sliced almonds if desired.
Repeat the cooking process until all the batter is used up.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
